title: How Multi-Million Investing Feels in My Body
subtitle: A journal prompt set for examining what large-scale investment triggers and finding the evidence that you can hold it
excerpt: A four-prompt journal set from Day 75 of a 12-week money programme. The prompts move from noticing what the idea of multi-million investing does in the body, to finding the old stories that run alongside it, to locating the past wins that prove you already know how to grow what is in your care.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 75 journal prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the scale of the investment you are working toward creates a gap between the number and what you believe you can hold.

content.text: A four-prompt journal set from Day 75 of a 12-week money programme. Day 75 theme: anchoring trust in multi-million investments. The prompts move from noticing what the idea does in the body, to naming the old stories that run alongside it, to finding the current wins that prove you already know how to grow what is in your care. Set a timer. Write without editing.
New to journal prompts as a practice? Read
How does the idea of investing millions feel in your body right now? Write whether it's expansive, exciting, or something else entirely.
Write the sensation specifically. What happens in your chest, your stomach, your shoulders when the number goes to seven figures?
What old money stories come up when you imagine handling that level of responsibility?
Name the story. Is it about not being qualified? About the risk of loss? About who gets to play at this level? Write it plainly.
How would you show up differently if you trusted completely that you could manage those investments with ease?
Write the specific behaviour change. What would you do this week that you are currently not doing?
What current or past financial wins remind you that you have always known how to grow what is in your care?
Name the specific win. What did you do? What grew? What does that tell you about your capacity?
Adapted from the Day 75 journal prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
